outcome_status: synthetic fixed-schedule audit; no H95 outcome queried

position_zero_interference.interpretation: The planted spillover changes later H95 blocks after delegated policy appears. The position-zero estimator has no earlier H95 block and remains centered on the direct-effect target, but it is a lower-precision sensitivity analysis.

claim_boundary: The audit validates the registered assignment law and bounded-outcome reporting rule. It does not reveal an H95 outcome, prove no cross-model interference, or identify market-wide routing or welfare.
